rules.template: the player lets the game master act
the game master lets you act
You walk away, happily sipping {ARG_0} that you purchased.
The player walks away, happily sipping {ARG_0} that they purchased.
You walk away, happily sipping {ARG_0} that you got for free.
The player walks away, happily sipping {ARG_0} that they got for free.
You decided you weren't thirsy and made a generous donation to the barista.
The player decided they weren't thirsy and made a generous donation to the barista.
{ARG_0} {TRY} to brew {ARG_1}, but something goes wrong
{ARG_0} {TRY} to leave the shop, but the door gets stuck
{ARG_0} {TRY} to enter the shop, but the door gets stuck

name: tutorial
title: Tutorial
description: A short tutorial about buying a drink to show how these games work.

actions.name: order(Player, Coffee)
actions.description: The player orders a cup of coffee.

actions.name: order(Player, Tea)
actions.description: The player orders a cup of herbal tea.

actions.name: brew(Barista, Coffee)
actions.description: The barista brews a cup of coffee.

actions.name: brew(Barista, Tea)
actions.description: The barista brews a cup of herbal tea.

actions.name: give(Player, Money, Barista)
actions.description: The player gives some money to the barista.

actions.name: give(Barista, Coffee, Player)
actions.description: The barista gives a cup of coffee to the player.

actions.name: give(Barista, Tea, Player)
actions.description: The barista gives a cup of herbal tea to the player.

actions.name: trade(Player, Money, Barista, Coffee)
actions.description: The player trades some money to the barista for a cup of coffee.

actions.name: trade(Player, Money, Barista, Tea)
actions.description: The player trades some money to the barista for a cup of herbal tea.

endings.name: donation()
endings.description: The player gave money to the barista but got not drink.

endings.name: free(Coffee)
endings.description: The player got a cup of coffee for free.

endings.name: free(Tea)
endings.description: The player got a cup of herbal tea for free.

endings.name: bought(Tea)
endings.description: The player purchased a cup of herbal tea.
